### Body (preview)

Forbes



 

 

 



 

 

 

Beyond the Billions: The Power Shifts Defining Global Wealth





 





 

 







https://click.read.forbes.com/? 



 

 

 

 



Secure Your Spot



 





Billionaires are reshaping the global economy in real time. Join the experts behind Forbes&rsquo; definitive World&rsquo;s Billionaires list on March 18th at 12pm ET for an inside look at the trends, power shifts and fortunes defining this year&rsquo;s ranking.



 



 We&rsquo;ll break down what&rsquo;s driving historic wealth creation, who&rsquo;s rising (and falling), and why tracking the world&rsquo;s richest people matters more than ever in a moment of rapid political, technological and financial change. This is the perfect time for you to ask us questions to get the story behind the valuations.



https://click.read.forbes.com/?%3D%3D 

Become a Member  now to unlock event access. As a member, you&rsquo;ll also be able to watch recordings from previous member events on topics such as wealth building, taxes and more &mdash; plus enjoy unlimited in-depth journalism and more on Forbes.com.
